input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

input.initialPrompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

data.content:
Here are the likely causes and fixes:

**1. `GoToAsync("productdetails")` throws an exception**

The route isn't registered. Non-visual (detail) routes must be explicitly registered:

```csharp
// In AppShell constructor or MauiProgram.cs
Routing.RegisterRoute("productdetails", typeof(ProductDetailsPage));
```

Routes defined inline in XAML (`<ShellContent Route="...">`) are for the Shell visual hierarchy. Programmatic navigation to pages *outside* that hierarchy requires `Routing.RegisterRoute`.

---

**2. `GoToAsync("//products/active")` navigates but nothing renders**

The absolute route (`//`) matches the Shell structure, so no exception is thrown — but the target `ShellContent` likely has no `ContentTemplate` or `ContentPage` wired up. Check your XAML:

```xml
<!-- ❌ Missing content — renders blank -->
<ShellContent Route="active" Title="Active" />

<!-- ✅ Fix: specify the page -->
<ShellContent Route="active" Title="Active"
              ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:ActiveProductsPage}" />
```

Using `ContentTemplate` (a `DataTemplate`) instead of setting `Content` directly also ensures the page is lazily created — which ties into problem 3.

---

**3. 3-second startup with 12 pages**

Shell instantiates every page whose content is set eagerly. Use **`ContentTemplate`** for lazy loading so pages are only created when first navigated to:

```xml
<!-- ❌ Eager — all 12 pages created at startup -->
<ShellContent Route="settings">
    <local:SettingsPage />
</ShellContent>

<!-- ✅ Lazy — page created on first navigation -->
<ShellContent Route="settings"
              ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:SettingsPage}" />
```

Do this for every `ShellContent`. Also check that page constructors and `ViewModel` initializations aren't doing heavy synchronous work (HTTP calls, DB queries). Defer those to `OnNavigatedTo` or `OnAppearing`.
data.reasoningText: The user is asking about three common .NET MAUI Shell navigation issues. These are well-known patterns I can answer directly from knowledge without needing to search any codebase.
